title: goodenia arenicola
intro: Goodenia arenicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia arenicola include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Goodenia arenicola can be consumed as a tea, or used as a topical treatment, and is often combined with other herbal preparations to enhance its effects.
